expanded_element.title: How Much Does Therapy Cost in 2025? | Project Healthy Minds
expanded_element.description: Therapy costs vary depending on your location, your provider, and the type of therapy. With insurance, most people pay $20-$50 per session, depending on their plan and provider. Without insurance, sessions usually range from $90 to $300+ per session.
